name: ai-daily-digest
description: Fetches RSS feeds from top tech blogs, uses AI to score and filter articles, and generates a daily digest in Markdown with Chinese-translated titles, category grouping, and trend highlights.
author: Community

name: algorithmic-art
description: Creates generative algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration, including flow fields and particle systems.
author: Anthropic

name: brainstorming
description: Explores user intent, requirements, and design before any implementation. Use before any creative work—features, components, or functionality additions.
author: Anthropic

name: canvas-design
description: Creates beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. For posters, art pieces, designs, or other static visual content.
author: Anthropic

name: doc-coauthoring
description: Structured workflow for co-authoring documentation, proposals, technical specs, and decision docs. Helps efficiently transfer context and refine content.
author: Anthropic

name: docx
description: Creates, reads, edits, and manipulates Word documents (.docx). Handles tables of contents, headings, page numbers, images, tracked changes, and format conversions.
author: Anthropic

name: frontend-design
description: Creates distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Builds web components, pages, dashboards, and React/HTML/CSS layouts.
author: Anthropic

name: mcp-builder
description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Supports Python (FastMCP) and Node/TypeScript.
author: Anthropic

name: pdf
description: Everything PDF: extract text/tables, combine or split files, rotate pages, add watermarks, create new PDFs, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt, extract images, and OCR on scanned PDFs.
author: Anthropic

name: pptx
description: Creates, reads, edits, and manipulates PowerPoint presentations (.pptx). Handles slide decks, pitch decks, templates, layouts, speaker notes, and format conversions.
author: Anthropic

name: systematic-debugging
description: Structured debugging methodology for any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior. Use before proposing fixes.
author: Anthropic

name: test-driven-development
description: TDD workflow: write tests before implementation code when implementing any feature or bugfix.
author: Anthropic

name: ui-ux-pro-max
description: Full UI/UX design intelligence: 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 chart types, 13 tech stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui).
author: Anthropic

name: xlsx
description: Works with spreadsheet files (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv): open, read, edit, create, add columns, compute formulas, format, chart, clean data, and convert between formats.
author: Anthropic

name: writing-plans
description: Creates structured implementation plans from specs or requirements for multi-step tasks. Use before touching code.
author: Anthropic
